nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Ferruginous babbler
nodes.summary: The ferruginous babbler (Pellorneum bicolor) is a species of bird in the family Pellorneidae. It is found in Brunei, Indonesia, Malaysia, Myanmar, and Thailand. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. References Winkler, D. W.; S. M. Billerman; I. J. Lovette (2020). "Family Pellorneidae (Ground Babblers and Allies)". Birds of the World Online. Cornell Lab of Ornithology, Ithaca, NY.
